summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE Semiconductor index, a modified market-cap-weighted index of 30 US-listed semiconductor companies. SOXX was launched on Jul 10, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.

holdings.infoBox: SOXX is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 8.39%, Micron Technology at 8.09%, NVIDIA at 7.60%, Broadcom at 7.11%, and Intel at 5.62%.
